form.formComment: Has finished sixth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Shepparton over 450m. Major threat on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished sixth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Shepparton over 450m. Major threat on best form.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Shepparton over 450m in 25.69. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 500m at this track at Bottom Up - Grade 5 level. Solid claims this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Shepparton over 450m in 25.69. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 500m at this track at Bottom Up - Grade 5 level. Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th over 450m at Shepparton beaten 10 lengths (26.03) behind Paw Hazelton in a Grade 5 on April 6. Fought on last time. Has the ability and right in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 5th over 450m at Shepparton beaten 10 lengths (26.03) behind Paw Hazelton in a Grade 5 on April 6. Fought on last time. Has the ability and right in the mix.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on turn off back straight and fell.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th over 390m at Ballarat beaten 6 lengths (22.78) behind Phoenix Tan in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 11. Has a fast 24.02 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 515m at Sandown. Likely to find this too tough.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (24.99) when sixth over 425m at this track in a Grade 5. Has three wins and four placings from 10 starts from the draw. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 14 over 400m at Geelong behind Bush Profit beaten 10 lengths (23.13). This appears within his reach.

formComments.comment: Most recent effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 14 over 400m at Geelong behind Bush Profit beaten 10 lengths (23.13). This appears within his reach.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide on home turn.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but swamped late when a close up fourth (25.94) at Shepparton over 450m. Form from this draw is very strong, including two wins. Hard to beat.
